<includeonly><table class="infobox">
<caption>Issue {{{id|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</caption>
{{#if:{{{type|}}}|<tr><th>Type</th><td>{{{type}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{severity|}}}|<tr><th>Severity</th><td>{{{severity}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{status|}}}|<tr><th>Status</th><td>{{{status}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{areas|}}}|<tr><th>Areas</th><td>{{{areas}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{disciplines|}}}|<tr><th>Disciplines</th><td>{{{disciplines}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{discovered|}}}|<tr><th>Discovered</th><td>{{{discovered}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{discovered_by|}}}|<tr><th>Discovered by</th><td>{{{discovered_by}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{assigned_to|}}}|<tr><th>Assigned to</th><td>{{{assigned_to}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{drawings|}}}|<tr><th>Drawings</th><td>{{{drawings}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{specs|}}}|<tr><th>Specs</th><td>{{{specs}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{resolved_by|}}}|<tr><th>Resolved by</th><td>{{{resolved_by}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{resolution_date|}}}|<tr><th>Resolution date</th><td>{{{resolution_date}}}</td></tr>}}
</table></includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<pre>
{{Infobox issue
| id            = 001
| type          = Drawing Conflict
| severity      = Critical
| status        = RFI Needed
| areas         = [[Area 03 — Primary Clarifiers]]
| disciplines   = Civil, Structural
| discovered    = 2026-02-12
| discovered_by = [[Task:0005]]
| drawings      = [[Drawing:C-301]], [[Drawing:S-302]]
}}
</pre>

Severity levels: Critical, Major, Minor, Informational.
Types: Drawing Conflict, Spec Conflict, Missing Information, Risk Item, Coordination Issue.

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
